query: Generate Drift tests for the DELETE /products/{id} endpoint in `evals/fixtures/simple-products-api.yaml`. The API has an empty database, so the product must be created before the test runs.
expected_behavior: Triggers the drift skill to handle test generation for a stateful endpoint
Produces a success test (deleteProduct_Success or similar) targeting source-oas:deleteProduct and expecting a 204 response
Includes an operation:started Lua hook in the success test that seeds the product via POST /products before the DELETE runs
The seed request in the hook uses valid product fields (id, name, price) matching the Product schema
Produces a 401 test (deleteProduct_Unauthorized or similar) that strips authentication and expects a 401 response
Produces a 403 test (deleteProduct_Forbidden or similar) that uses a valid token lacking delete permission and expects a 403 response
Produces a 404 test (deleteProduct_NotFound or similar) that uses a guaranteed non-existent ID and expects a 404 response
Does NOT modify the OpenAPI spec
